description: Figure 4 Calycina brevipes (HKAS139498). a–c. Dried ascomata on the host; d, e. Vertical section of an ascoma; f. Excipulum; g. Paraphyses; h–m. Asci (k–m. Asci in Meltzer's reagent); n, o. Apical part of ascus in Melzer's reagent; p, q. Ascospores. Scale bars: 100 µm (d); 50 µm (f); 20 µm(g–m); 5 µm (n–q).
